solution:

```python
class Codec:
    def encode(self, longUrl: str) -> str:
        return hash(longUrl) % 26

    def decode(self, shortUrl: str) -> str:
        return chr(ord(shortUrl[0]) - self.encode(shortUrl[1:])
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW

Explanation:
The solution uses the hash function to generate a short URL and the chr function to convert the hash back to a URL character. The time complexity is O(1) because the hash function always takes a constant time to generate a hash, regardless of the input URL length. The space complexity is also O(1) because the class only uses a constant amount of space for the hash and character conversion operations.
